## Summary

### runtime.Object Interface
Defined in `kubernetes/kubernetes` at `staging/src/k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/interfaces.go`. It requires:
- `GetObjectKind() schema.ObjectKind` — provided by embedding `metav1.TypeMeta` (implemented in `apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1/meta.go`)
- `DeepCopyObject() Object` — generated per-type in `zz_generated.deepcopy.go`

### Core/v1 Types Implementing runtime.Object (kubernetes/api)

**`core/v1/types.go`** — Types embedding both `metav1.TypeMeta` + `metav1.ObjectMeta` (full API objects):
`Pod`, `PodTemplate`, `PodStatusResult`, `ReplicationController`, `Service`, `ServiceAccount`, `Endpoints`, `Node`, `Namespace`, `Binding`, `Event`, `LimitRange`, `ResourceQuota`, `Secret`, `ConfigMap`, `ComponentStatus`, `RangeAllocation`, `PersistentVolume`, `PersistentVolumeClaim`

Plus list types (TypeMeta only) and options types — all also implement runtime.Object via `zz_generated.deepcopy.go`.

### Scheme Registration Chain

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `kubernetes/api` → `core/v1/register.go` | Registers v1 types via `scheme.AddKnownTypes` |
| `kubernetes/kubernetes` → `pkg/apis/core/register.go` | Registers internal `__internal` types |
| `kubernetes/kubernetes` → `pkg/apis/core/v1/register.go` | Wires conversion/defaults for v1 |
| `kubernetes/kubernetes` → `pkg/apis/core/install/install.go` | `Install()` adds all to the legacy scheme |
| `kubernetes/kubernetes` → `staging/.../runtime/scheme.go` | `Scheme.AddKnownTypes()` — the core registry method |
